design_notes: S0 acts as the main groove of this short synthwave track, featuring alternating high and low energy bars. To ensure a relaxed casual experience, notes are placed 2.0 beats apart on average. We carefully mapped quieter bars with 4-beat rests to allow the track to breathe. The three hold candidates (s001, m081, and m096) are mapped as 2-beat holds, providing exactly 16.6% hold ratio and keeping other lanes clear during holds. Lane distribution has been meticulously balanced at exactly 6 notes per lane (33.3% each) across GAP, BAR, and NOTE to prevent any single-lane bias while avoiding artificial stair patterns.

sections.name: S0
sections.intent: Introduce the main groove, build up density, and let low-energy transitions breathe.
